goal: Expose the existing exact-tab URL binding as a manual fallback in legacy extension mode when automatic provider discovery cannot bind a session.
non_goals: Do not scrape, return, log, or persist cookies, tokens, localStorage, session response bodies, or account identity.
Do not automate login, CAPTCHA, human verification, provider navigation, or ChatGPT live testing.
Do not replace automatic discovery; manual URL binding is a user-triggered fallback only.
acceptance_criteria: Every unbound extension-mode provider card exposes a folded manual URL binding control.
A pasted URL binds only the exact already-open matching provider tab after authentication, verification, and composer checks.
Only the sanitized URL returned by the server is persisted, and reload never auto-binds it.
Automatic discovery, CDP binding, unbind, and recovery behavior continue to pass regression tests.
DeepSeek and Doubao manual binding are verified without sending a live prompt or operating ChatGPT.
